title: Claude Code — Abilities Map
subtitle: Agents · Skills · Recommended VS Code extensions · Integrations

items.name: claude-code-guide
items.note: answers Claude Code / SDK / API how-tos

items.name: session-start-hook
items.note: wire SessionStart hooks for cloud sessions

items.name: loop
items.note: run a prompt on a recurring interval

items.name: init
items.note: scaffold a CLAUDE.md for the repo

columns.heading: VS Code extensions (paired with this repo)

items.name: Python
items.note: ms-python.python — runs the .py code in trading_research/

items.name: Claude in Chrome
items.note: Anthropic browser extension — drives Claude alongside any page. Complements kapture's DevTools MCP.

items.name: Kapture (this repo)
items.note: Chrome DevTools extension exposing browser-control tools over MCP. Configured in .mcp.json.

items.name: GitHub MCP server
items.note: Provided by the harness at session level (not in .mcp.json). Used for PR/issue ops via mcp__github__* tools.

items.name: Figma MCP
items.note: Read designs from Figma, render diagrams in FigJam. Use when a figma.com URL appears.

items.name: Notion MCP
items.note: Read/write Notion pages and databases. Available when configured.
